name: Baked S'mores
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F. Grease an 8-inch square pan.
2. Combine cookie mix, contents of buttery flavor packet from Mix, egg and water in a large bowl. Stir until thoroughly blended. Divide the cookie dough into half. Press half of the dough evenly into the bottom of the pan.
3. Cut each milk chocolate bar into 12 sections by following the division marks on the bars. Arrange the chocolate sections into 4 rows, with 9 sections in each row.
4. Place spoonfuls of marshmallow creme on top of the chocolate. Spread to cover the chocolate and cookie dough. Drop the remaining cookie dough by teaspoonfuls on top of the marshmallow creme. Spread lightly with the back of a spoon.
5. Bake at 350°F for 25-30 minutes or until light golden brown. Cool completely. Cut into squares.
Makes 9 squares.
